Video.title: Oakland Coliseum - Oakland, CA

Video.summary: Buckle in for all the Racing and Freestyle Monster Jam action at Raymond James Stadium on January 22, 2015!
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson looks to extend his series points lead as Bakugan Dragonoid’s Camden Murphy attempts to climb back to the top of the Stadium Championship Series Red leaderboard. Megalodon’s Todd Leduc is riding a wave of momentum as he continues his rise back into title contention.
Video.title: JMA Wireless Dome - Syracuse, NY

Video.summary: Will anyone bring down Ryan Anderson, the reigning world champion? Find out now!
Video.title: Levi's Stadium - Santa Clara, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam heads to San Diego, California to show off their motor skills at Snapdragon Stadium with freestyle and racing action!
Video.title: Snapdragon Stadium - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: The Monster Jam 2021 Stadium Championship Series continues at Lucas Oil Stadium in Indianapolis, IN.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Levi's Stadium - Santa Clara, CA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series East returns to the dome as Tyler Menninga attempts to lead Grave Digger to back-to-back event championships. Tom Meents wants to double down in freestyle and Tristan England looking for a win for his new JCB Digatron.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX

Video.summary: April's 2025 Points Series was INSANE! We've got the definitive recap of the absolute BEST freestyle moments and the most thrilling racing wins. You won't want to miss this!
Video.title: Best Of 2025 Racing And Freestyle Wins
